tip.title: 0a · Submission
rows: Letter of intent filed Apr 14, 2026.
Required pre-application filing — sets review cycle and batching window.

tip.title: 0b · Review Cycle / Batching
rows: Acknowledged Apr 17, 2026.
Planning service area: Fulton County.

tip.title: 1a · Application Submitted
rows: Submitted Apr 14, 2026.
Filing fee paid · 120-day review clock started.

tip.title: 1b · Review Cycle / Batching
rows: Batching window opened Apr 24, 2026.
Reviewed against competing applications in the same planning service area, if any.

tip.title: 1c · Public Comment / Opposition
rows: Notice period opened May 4, 2026.
Affected persons may file comments or notice of opposition.

tip.title: 1d · Desk Decision
rows: Due by Aug 12, 2026 (120 days from filing).

forks.label: Approved with Conditions
forks.title: Conditions may include bed limits, service restrictions, or compliance reporting

tip.title: 2a · Challenge Filed
rows: Filed Aug 26, 2026 (within 30 days of the letter of determination).
Any aggrieved party who timely intervened may request review.

tip.title: 2b · Challenge Registered
rows: Docketed by DCH Office of Health Planning.
Timeliness and standing screened before assignment to a hearing officer.

forks.label: No challenge filed
forks.title: Desk decision becomes final — no further review

tip.title: 3a · Hearing Officer Appointed
rows: Appointed Sep 25, 2026 (within 30 days of the challenge).
Assigned by the Office of State Administrative Hearings.

tip.title: 3b · Scheduling Conference
rows: Held Oct 4, 2026.
Hearing dates and discovery deadlines set.

tip.title: 3c · Hearing Window
rows: Window: 60–120 days after appointment.
Hearing dates: Jan 2, 2027.

tip.title: 3d · Contested Case Hearing
rows: Evidentiary hearing on need, financial feasibility, and access criteria.
Parties: DCH, applicant, and any intervening competing applicant.

tip.title: 3e · Hearing Officer Decision
rows: Due within 30 days of hearing conclusion.

current.label: Reformed Regime (HB 1339)
current.detail: Hearing officer decision = final agency decision. Effective 2024 · No Commissioner review.

stages.title: Judicial Review
stages.dateLine: Petition within 30 days of final agency decision

tip.title: 5a · Petition for Judicial Review
rows: Must file within 30 days of the final agency decision.
Any party except DCH may petition · Venue: Superior Court.

tip.title: 5b · Record Transmittal
rows: DCH must transmit the certified record and transcript within 30 days of notice of appeal.

tip.title: 5c · Hearing on the Record
rows: Review confined to the administrative record — no new evidence.
Deferential, substantial-evidence standard.

tip.title: 5d · Superior Court Disposition
rows: Branch: Affirm / Reverse / Remand.
120-day default rule: if the court does not hear within 120 days of docketing, the agency decision is affirmed by operation of law.

tip.title: 6a · Court of Appeals
rows: Either party may appeal the Superior Court order.
Branch: Affirm / Reverse / Remand.

tip.title: 6b · Supreme Court of Georgia
rows: By certiorari — discretionary review.
Petition for cert. granted or denied.

precedent.label: VALID PRECEDENT
precedent.detail: No negative subsequent treatment found · Last reviewed May 26, 2026

tip.title: 1a · Request Filed
rows: Filed Mar 14, 2026.
Request on DCH form + filing fee · Subject: substantial equivalent of a new institutional health service.
No letter of intent required · no review cycle or batching.

tip.title: 1b · Subject Defined
rows: Request on DCH form + filing fee · Subject: substantial equivalent of a new institutional health service.
Classification sought: substantial equivalent of a new institutional health service.

tip.title: 1c · Sufficiency Screen
rows: DCH administrative review of submitted information.
Sufficiency confirmed Mar 25, 2026 · ~60-day review window begins.

tip.title: 2a · Reviewability Test
rows: Is this a new institutional health service? Outcomes: Reviewable / Not Reviewable / Conditioned.

tip.title: 2b · Letter of Determination Issued
rows: Due by Apr 28, 2026.

forks.label: No Challenge Filed
forks.title: Letter becomes final without further review — most DETs end here

stages.title: Administrative Appeal
stages.dateLine: Identical mechanics to CON administrative appeal — HB 1339: HO decision = final agency decision

tip.title: 4a · Hearing Officer Appointed
rows: Appointed Jun 11, 2026 (within 30 days of appeal filing).
Same mechanics as CON administrative appeal.

tip.title: 4b · Scheduling Conference
rows: Held Jun 20, 2026 (within 14 days of appointment).

tip.title: 4c · Hearing Window
rows: Window: 60–120 days after filing.
Hearing set Aug 19, 2026.

tip.title: 4d · Contested Case Hearing
rows: Evidence, witnesses, and reviewability-criteria arguments.
Same format as CON hearing.

tip.title: 4e · Hearing Officer Decision
rows: Due within 30 days of hearing conclusion.

tip.title: 5 · Superior Court Petition
rows: Any party except DCH may petition within 30 days of the final agency decision.
Review on the administrative record — deferential standard.
120-day default: if no hearing within 120 days of docketing, the agency decision is affirmed by operation of law.

tip.title: 5 · Court of Appeals
rows: Either party may appeal the Superior Court order.
Branch: Affirm / Reverse / Remand.

tip.title: 5 · Supreme Court of Georgia
rows: By certiorari — discretionary review.
